title: Webkit Component Spec — frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter of every .specs/<name>.md. Body sections (Props/Events/Slots/...) are validated separately by .claude/hooks/_lib/spec.mjs.

checksum.description: sha256 of the spec body (everything after the frontmatter). Written by spec-validator on approval; verified by enforce-spec-exists on every Write.

deprecated.description: When true, the eslint-plugin's no-deprecated-component steers consumers off this component (see replaced_by).

replaced_by.description: kebab name of the component that replaces this deprecated one.

style_seam.description: When true, this component is intentionally personalizable: the consumer may pass class/style to its root, so no-style-override allows it (a documented style seam, e.g. a layout/container wrapper).

then.description: Once a spec is approved or beyond, the checksum field is mandatory and must match sha256(body).
